creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freenas.org/> for FreeNAS redirects to: 

<https://www.truenas.com/>

> TrueNAS …

Outdated references to FreeNAS (found by Google) include: 

<https://www.freebsd.org/advocacy/myths/#own-distro>

<https://www.freebsd.org/projects/newbies/#_learning_about_freebsd_derived_projects>
<https://www.freebsd.org/ja/projects/newbies/#_freebsd_%E7%94%B1%E6%9D%A5%E3%81%AE%E3%83%97%E3%83%AD%E3%82%B8%E3%82%A7%E3%82%AF%E3%83%88%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6%E5%AD%A6%E3%81%B6>

<https://www.freebsd.org/where/#derived>
<https://www.freebsd.org/de/where/#derived>
<https://www.freebsd.org/fr/where/#derived>
<https://www.freebsd.org/ja/where/#derived>
<https://www.freebsd.org/nl/where/#derived>
<https://www.freebsd.org/ru/where/#derived>
<https://www.freebsd.org/zh-cn/where/#derived>
<https://www.freebsd.org/zh-tw/where/#derived>

<https://www.freebsd.org/de/projects/#_auf_freebsd_basierende_betriebssysteme>

Side note: 

* <https://www.freebsd.org/projects/> mentions neither FreeNAS nor TrueNAS
